headline: AIZ Q1 Earnings & Revenues Top Estimates on Solid Investment Income
summary: Assurant's Q1 results reflect solid performance in both Global Lifestyle and Global Housing, and earnings growth across both Connected Living and Global Automotive.

headline: PRU Q1 Earnings & Revenues Top Estimates on Solid Investment Spread
summary: Prudential Financial's Q1 results reflect higher asset management fees, new business growth and improved net investment spread results.

headline: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Maintains Outperform on Everest Group, Raises Price Target to $411
summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods  analyst Meyer Shields   maintains Everest Group (NYSE:EG) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $402 to $411.
